changes.comment: sdk-ui-pluggable-host: Embedded dashboards now defer to the host-owned GenAI chat instead of mounting their own. The AI-assistant context event carries the chat placement (showassistant left/right) and an embedded flag, and the pluggable mount handle gains onAiAssistantLinkClicked so an embedded app can handle chat link clicks in-app (e.g. open a visualization as an in-place overlay).
